# Generated by scripts/generate_raw_material_local_map_modes.py - do not edit by hand.
# Displays local_<good>_output_modifier for every parsed raw_material good.
# Purple-to-green classified diverging scale. Values are additive percentages (0.1 = +10%).
# Wheat uses a harvest-neutral value; all modes mark matching raw-material locations with stripes.
# Geography index = 2 keeps these in the terrain/climate bucket.

@zoom_step_near = 2
@data_gradient_alpha_inside = 1
@data_gradient_alpha_outside = 1
@data_gradient_width = 0.25
@data_gradient_color_mult = 0.9
@data_edge_width = 0
@data_edge_sharpness = 0.01
@data_edge_alpha = 0
@data_edge_color_mult = 0
@data_before_lighting_blend = 0.5
@data_after_lighting_blend = 0.5

pp_local_horses_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_horses_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_horses_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:horses
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_clay_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_clay_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_clay_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:clay
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult

		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend

}

pp_local_sand_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sand_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sand_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:sand
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_coal_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coal_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coal_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:coal
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COAL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_iron_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_iron_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_iron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:iron
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_copper_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_copper_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_copper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:copper
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_goods_gold_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_goods_gold_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:goods_gold
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GOODS_GOLD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_silver_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silver_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silver_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:silver
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILVER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_stone_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_stone_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_stone_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:stone
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_STONE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_tin_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tin_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:tin
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TIN_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_lead_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lead_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:lead
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEAD_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_silk_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_silk_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_silk_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:silk
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SILK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_dyes_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_dyes_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_dyes_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:dyes
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_incense_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_incense_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_incense_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:incense
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_INCENSE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_tea_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tea_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tea_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:tea
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TEA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_cocoa_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
