				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:cocoa
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COCOA_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_coffee_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_coffee_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_coffee_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:coffee
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COFFEE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_fiber_crops_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fiber_crops_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:fiber_crops
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FIBER_CROPS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_ivory_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_ivory_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_ivory_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:ivory
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_IVORY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_lumber_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_lumber_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_lumber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:lumber
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LUMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_salt_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_salt_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:salt
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_medicaments_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_medicaments_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:medicaments
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MEDICAMENTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_gems_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_gems_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_gems_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:gems
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_GEMS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_pearls_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pearls_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pearls_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:pearls
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEARLS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_amber_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_amber_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:amber
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_AMBER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_saltpeter_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saltpeter_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:saltpeter
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_alum_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_alum_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:alum
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ALUM_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wine_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wine_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wine_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:wine
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WINE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_elephants_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_elephants_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_elephants_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:elephants
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_ELEPHANTS_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_marble_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_marble_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_marble_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:marble
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MARBLE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_mercury_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_mercury_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_mercury_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:mercury
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
