	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MERCURY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_saffron_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_saffron_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_saffron_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:saffron
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAFFRON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_pepper_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_pepper_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_pepper_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:pepper
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_PEPPER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_cloves_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cloves_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cloves_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:cloves
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLOVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_chili_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_chili_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_chili_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:chili
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CHILI_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_cotton_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_cotton_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_cotton_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:cotton
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_COTTON_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_sugar_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_sugar_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_sugar_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:sugar
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SUGAR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_tobacco_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:tobacco
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wool_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wool_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wool_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:wool
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wild_game_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wild_game_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:wild_game
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_fur_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fur_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:fur
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_fish_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_fish_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_fish_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:fish
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FISH_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wheat_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:wheat
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_maize_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_maize_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_maize_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:maize
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_rice_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_rice_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_rice_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:rice
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_RICE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_millet_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
				max_color = rgb { 194 165 207 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				max_color = rgb { 231 212 232 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 217 240 211 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				max_color = rgb { 166 219 160 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				max_color = rgb { 90 174 97 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 1.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				max_color = rgb { 27 120 55 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 1.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 20 110 50 }
				max_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.00
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_millet_productivity_map_value < 2.00 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 4 77 30 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 1.50
					divide = 0.50
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			value = rgb { 0 50 20 }
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:millet
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 222 202 224 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 235 244 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 45 138 64 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 50 20 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_RAW_MATERIAL" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MILLET_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_legumes_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_legumes_productivity_map_value <= -1.00 }
			value = rgb { 64 0 75 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 75 10 88 }
				max_color = rgb { 118 42 131 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 130 69 146 }
				max_color = rgb { 153 112 171 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_legumes_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_legumes_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 166 129 184 }
